name: Jiangsu Zijin Rural Commercial Bank Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Zijin Rural Commercial Bank Co.,Ltd provides various banking products and services to personal and business customers. It offers deposits; loans; foreign currency deposits, international settlement, trade finance, and capital services; and financial industry and investment banking services. The company also offers debit and credit cards; and mobile and Internet banking services, as well as ATMs. It operates 1 business department, 3 branches, 7 first-level branches, 1 technology sub-branch, 119 second-level sub-branches, and 2 county sub-branches. Jiangsu Zijin Rural Commercial Bank Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.
